hero.question: Indian Premier League: Royal Challengers Bangalore vs Chennai Super Kings
hero.prob_take:
Bangalore at 74.5% is basically saying they're a 3-to-1 favorite, which tracks for a team playing at home with momentum, but that 13-point jump in 24 hours smells like sharp money chasing rather than new information.

The real question is whether this is baking in Bangalore's recent form or just Vegas-style home-field recency bias, because Chennai's death bowling has been surgical all season and this line assumes they'll regress to the mean.

daily_take.headline: RCB's 74.5% odds just jumped 13 points. The real tell is what didn't move.
daily_take.deck: Royal Challengers Bangalore hit 74.5% overnight, up 13 points on what looks like routine IPL chatter. The market is pricing in a comfortable CSK collapse, but 444K volume is light for a move this size. Sharp money hasn't followed the retail bid yet, which means either the move stalls here or we see a second wave. The play: wait for conviction volume before chasing.

sidebar.headline: Iran ground op odds spiked 12.5 points but volume stayed flat at 333K. Narrative moves without money are noise.

sidebar.headline: Lakers dropped 17 points to 53.5% on actual Mavericks momentum. This one has real volume backing it at 654K. Sharp bets favor Dallas.

sidebar.headline: Hormuz traffic back to normal sits at 15.5% with 2.8M volume. Massive money betting on supply chain friction. Market is pricing in extended disruption.
